title: Balanitis - NHS
text:
#x27;s penis every day
use warm water and then dry it gently
if they wear nappies, change your child's nappies often
Don’t
do not use soap, bubble bath or baby wipes
do not pull your child's foreskin back if it's fixed in place
Causes of balanitis 
Causes of balanitis include:
not washing your penis properly some young boys have a very tight foreskin (phimosis) , which means they cannot pull it back to clean under it thrush a sexually transmitted infection (STI) such as gonorrhoea or chlamydia – if a STI is suspected you may be referred to a sexual health clinic substances such as soap, shower gels or condoms may irritate the skin diabetes – high levels of sugar in your pee can cause thrush 
Page last reviewed: 30 May 2023
Next review due: 30 May 2026
